title: Kanade's Kill
description: This mod adds a special sword that aims to kill everything.
body:
[English]
This mod adds a very strong sword that aims to kill every mob in Minecraft.
WARN: This mod is very unstable at present especially if it runs with other kill mods like FantasyEnd,ChaosWither,Absolute Blade,Annihilation,King's mod,realTerminalMod,Ultimate,etc. Don’t forget to backup your saves.
Use command /give @s kanade:kill to get the sword.

[中文]
一个简单的秒杀mod。目前有一个简单的字段回溯，禁事件和全方法返回。
警告：此mod现阶段级不稳定，尤其是你把它与别的秒杀mod一起加载时。 使用前建议备份存档。
使用指令 /give @s kanade:kill 获得物品。


:)
